This includes processing more than 3 million disability compensation and pension claims over the past fiscal year.

Free, confidential, and available 24/7 for our veterans and their loved ones.

Dial 988 and press 1 to reach the Veterans Crisis Line. https://t.co/HOio07hKA6

I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window.
